overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a rainy highway drive through tunnels and overpasses. The player follows a silver futuristic vehicle through winding roads in a dystopian urban environment with heavy rain and cyberpunk infrastructure.

events.description: vehicle enters tunnel from rainy highway, transitioning from natural to artificial lighting
approaching tunnel exit, daylight visible at the end of the tunnel

agents.ego_description: driving through a well-lit concrete tunnel, following a silver car ahead

notable_agents.action: silver futuristic car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: concrete tunnel walls and ceiling with embedded lighting fixtures
overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel interior
wet asphalt with yellow lane markings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a concrete highway tunnel from the rain, following a silver car ahead. Artificial lighting illuminates the enclosed space as the dashboard displays speed and navigation data, with the tunnel exit visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy multi-lane highway with guardrails and trees

events.description: exiting tunnel into heavy rain and open highway environment
slowing down while following the car ahead on wet road surface

agents.ego_description: navigating wet highway conditions, maintaining safe following distance from the vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: silver car braking and slowing down on the wet road surface

entered.detail: metal safety barriers with yellow reflective strips
tall lamp posts lining the highway
green trees visible through the rain on the roadside

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into heavy rain, the scene opens onto a wet multi-lane highway lined with guardrails and trees. The vehicle follows a silver car that is slowing down on the slick surface, with street lights visible along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding highway with curves and directional signs

events.description: taking a left curve on the highway, following the road bend
navigating a right curve with guardrails on the right side

agents.ego_description: steering through winding highway curves while maintaining pursuit of the target vehicle

notable_agents.action: silver car navigating the curves ahead, occasionally braking on turns

entered.detail: yellow directional arrow signs indicating curves in the road

segments.scene_description: The highway winds through hilly terrain with directional chevron signs marking the curves. The vehicle follows the silver car through left and right turns, with guardrails and rocky hillsides flanking the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with billboards and approaching overpass infrastructure

events.description: passing large digital billboard on the right side of the highway
approaching multi-level highway interchange with overpasses visible ahead

agents.ego_description: accelerating on straight sections while approaching urban infrastructure and billboards

notable_agents.action: silver car maintaining speed on straight highway section

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying commercial content
concrete highway overpass structure spanning the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The highway straightens as large digital billboards and electrical towers come into view. The vehicle approaches a complex highway interchange with overpasses visible in the distance, transitioning from rural to urban infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with concrete overpasses and elevated ramps

events.description: driving under first overpass structure, entering sheltered area
Japantown location notification appears on the vehicle HUD
taking a right curve on the elevated highway ramp

agents.ego_description: navigating through the covered sections beneath massive concrete overpasses and up elevated ramps

notable_agents.action: silver car continuing ahead under the overpass complex and up the ramp

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with support pillars creating partial cover
thick concrete columns holding up the overpass structure
tropical palm trees visible near the highway interchange
neon signage indicating entrance to Japantown district
red and white striped concrete barriers along the elevated ramp edge

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives beneath massive concrete overpasses that partially shelter the road from rain, with support pillars lining the sides. A Japantown notification appears as the car navigates an elevated ramp with distinctive red safety barriers, following the silver car through the complex infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from the artificial enclosure of a highway tunnel into a rain-slicked, winding mountain road. It begins inside a concrete tunnel where artificial lights illuminate the dashboard and a silver car ahead, moving steadily toward a distant exit. As the vehicle emerges from the tunnel, the environment opens into a heavy downpour on a multi-lane highway lined with guardrails and street lights. The scene then shifts as the road begins to curve through hilly terrain, following the silver car through a series of left and right turns. Finally, the camera tracks the vehicle past directional chevron signs and rocky hillsides as it navigates the winding, wet asphalt.

The shot follows a continuous drive along a rainy highway that transforms from an open industrial corridor into a dense urban interchange. It begins as the road straightens, passing beneath towering electrical pylons and large digital billboards that signal the approach to the city. As the vehicle enters a complex highway interchange, the open sky is gradually replaced by the oppressive weight of massive concrete overpasses and support pillars. The scene then shifts onto an elevated ramp lined with distinctive red safety barriers, following a silver car deeper into the infrastructure as a Japantown notification appears.
